cases.title: ORDER_BY with scope - no DB-wide columns
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY c|

expected.comment: Scope=[users]. Only scope column users.created_at. DB-wide excluded.

cases.title: ORDER_BY after column + space suggests ASC/DESC only
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at |

expected.comment: Whitespace after column - shows all columns, functions, and keywords.

cases.title: ORDER_BY after comma suggests columns again
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id=o.user_id ORDER BY u.name, |

expected.comment: Comma = next-item rules. Scope columns + functions.

cases.title: GROUP_BY with scope - no DB-wide columns
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM users GROUP BY s|

expected.comment: Scope=[users]. Only scope column users.status. DB-wide excluded.

cases.title: GROUP_BY with CURRENT_TABLE not in scope - CURRENT_TABLE ignored
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM orders GROUP BY s|

expected.comment: Scope=[orders]. CURRENT_TABLE=users not in scope. Only scope column orders.status.
